recommendations.title: Camp Nowhere
recommendations.overview: Morris "Mud" Himmel has a problem. His parents desperately want to send him away to summer camp. He hates going to summer camp, and would do anything to get out of it. Talking to his friends, he realizes that they are all facing the same sentence: a

recommendations.title: College
recommendations.overview: A wild weekend is in store for three high school seniors who visit a local college campus as prospective freshmen.

recommendations.title: Daddy Day Camp
recommendations.overview: Seeking to offer his son the satisfying summer camp experience that eluded him as a child, the operator of a neighborhood daycare center opens his own camp, only to face financial hardship and stiff competition from a rival camp.

recommendations.title: Another Gay Sequel: Gays Gone Wild!
recommendations.overview: Four university students head to Florida for spring break and enroll in a contest to see who can get the most sexual partners.

recommendations.title: #1 Cheerleader Camp
recommendations.overview: A pair of horny college guys get summer jobs at a sexy cheerleader camp.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Camp Scare
recommendations.overview: Scooby and the gang experience outdoor fun as they go back to Fred's old summer camp. As summer goes on, it becomes increasingly clear that the spooky camp stories told by the fireplace, are more real than they've though and soon, it's up to the gang

recommendations.title: Project X
recommendations.overview: Three high school seniors throw a party to make a name for themselves. As the night progresses, things spiral out of control as word of the party spreads.

recommendations.title: Spontaneous
recommendations.overview: When students in their high school begin inexplicably exploding (literally), seniors Mara and Dylan struggle to survive in a world where each moment may be their last.

recommendations.title: Cocoon
recommendations.overview: When a group of trespassing seniors swim in a pool containing alien cocoons, they find themselves energized with youthful vigor.

recommendations.title: Holy Camp!
recommendations.overview: María and Susana, two rebellious teenagers, spend the summer in a catholic camp. While they are grounded during a weekend, the most unexpected arrival in the most unexpected way will change their feelings about life, love and freedom.
